description: You are the facility manager performing the annual data rollover. Rename the existing 'annual_yield' feed to 'annual_yield_archive' to preserve its history. Create a new feed named 'annual_yield' using the PHPFina engine with a 10s interval and update the 'solar_yield' input processing to log to this new 'annual_yield' feed. When finished, the system should have 'annual_yield_archive' containing the archived data and 'annual_yield' receiving new data from the 'solar_yield' input.
